title: Spotify App Functionality Description
business_case_summary:
Business Case Summary: Spotify App Functionality Description (DEM-2026-0011)

Executive Summary:
This project aims to clearly document the core functionality of the Spotify application. It will serve as a foundational resource for internal teams and new developers.

Business Value/Impact:
This description will enhance internal knowledge transfer and accelerate developer onboarding, reducing time spent on basic explanations. It provides a clear reference for future feature development and troubleshooting.

Potential Risk Mitigation:
The primary risk is the the documentation becoming outdated; this will be mitigated by scheduled, quarterly reviews. A clear scope definition will prevent over-description and maintain focus.
capacity_reasoning: Delivery team has 26% overall available capacity.
Constraint: Senior Architect has only 5 units available (requires 10).
Skill gap: Required skills System Design, Technical Writing are missing in the available workforce.
Earliest available start date is deferred by 30 days to 2026-08-08.
